title: Rebuild Genderbending ex Shinjiko WHY
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Oct 03, 2009 11:44 am Is it wrong if I say that I loved the use of the softer songs during the film’s turning points, and I really think they both conveyed context or foreshadowing, while at the same time coating something horrible with a bit of sugar. I really do think the lyrics to Asuka’s “sayanora” and Rei’s “Tori” were relevant to the film LiLi wrote: @Synapsid: I rather like your subversion of the harem trope idea. I have been thinking something along those lines would probably apply to EoE and Anno's intent to troll the audience. But as for the fans' reception of the 'twincest' element in S/R... well, IIRC, Japanese audiences seem to LOVE their twincest... ;) IIRC, "I'm in love with my little sister" was even turned into a cute live action movie! If the Rei-as-Yui's-clone didn't squick S/R fans out, perhaps Rei as a metaphorical little twin would probably squick them out even less? I suppose it would still provide that layer of tragic forbidden love to the relationship with the twist of it not actually being exactly 'real' twincest?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Oct 03, 2009 11:49 am Sigh....it's so hard to get involved in discussions on this website anymore ever since it's become a trend that almost all threads have to be hijacked into another lame GenderBend the characters game. It has little to do with the show itself. And it's making the forums become a giant bore.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 11:51 am SaltyJoe and Synapsikyun , I strongly suggest we take Angelic!Oskar to the Shinjiko-thread ... Wait, we CAN discuss Rebuild stuff there if we use spoilertags, right?? If needed, I'll edit my previous post and copy the relevant line of my post there. :EDIT: Done

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Oct 03, 2009 12:00 pm ^ Err, you're right we probably should take it there; I see no reason why we couldn’t discuss any of that in the Shinko thread if it’s tagged...I’ll mask out anything related to that

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 12:10 pm :EDIT: since we don't need spoilertags anymore! From the Since you guys hate Rebuild so much... thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=290146#290146 SaltyJoe wrote: ...like have the Angelic side manifest itself as a split personality that is represented as a male version of Asuka (Oscar!).

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Oct 03, 2009 12:19 pm I guess it should be grafted here Sort of a RoE  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Oct 03, 2009 12:26 pm Teague wrote: I don't think Zeruel recognised Rei as being an individual. This is mostly fanwank, but likely it 'consumed' her because he felt Lilith's soul...it took 'Lillith' into himself and was immediately effected (apparently Rei induces puberty)...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 03, 2009 1:06 pm LiLi wrote: Wait, we CAN discuss Rebuild stuff there if we use spoilertags, right??

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 1:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: LiLi wrote: Wait, we CAN discuss Rebuild stuff there if we use spoilertags, right??

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:57 pm @ Mr Tines: Thank you for making this thread. I guess Genben!Mari (Martin?) related posts will go here from now on?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 03, 2009 3:10 pm If there had to be a name for a generbent Mari (...) the two names that come to mind are Martin and Maurice.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Oct 03, 2009 3:30 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Maurice.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 03, 2009 3:44 pm Okay, so I added the rest of the gender-bender discussion stuff in this thread. PLEASE keep it in here. Thank you and carry on.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Oct 03, 2009 4:19 pm You know that's impossible. That would be like containing a zombie outbreak.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 03, 2009 4:23 pm backseatjesus wrote: That would be like containing a zombie outbreak.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 4:24 pm ^Would 3.0!Oskarel count as a Zombie?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Oct 03, 2009 5:22 pm No, because Asuka is still alive. Honestly, Oskarel? Asukael was bad enough. Hell, Oskar was bad enough. This genderbend stuff is just UGH to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 03, 2009 5:25 pm LiLi wrote: ^Would 3.0!Oskarel count as a Zombie?

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:35 am Thanks for the thread split, now we finally have a convenient place to put what couldn't have gone outside of RoE without spoilers but wouldn't have been suited out of the genben thread... Like how Anno has so far cheated us out of a male test plug scene Joseph the PRPD wrote: If there had to be a name for a generbent Mari (...) the two names that come to mind are Martin and Maurice.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:50 am I revived a monster . Joseph the PRPD wrote: If there had to be a name for a generbent Mari (...) the two names that come to mind are Martin and Maurice.
